metadata.description: Memex realized with LLMs — a personal wiki the model maintains. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM wiki pattern.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Synthesize Claude sessions and notes into a self-maintaining personal wiki. Provides /llm-wiki:init, /llm-wiki:ingest, /llm-wiki:ask, /llm-wiki:lint, /llm-wiki:upgrade-schema commands, a SessionEnd hook for automatic capture, a UserPromptSubmit hook that injects relevant wiki summaries into every prompt, and git-aware sync (pull before ingest, push after commit) for multi-machine use.
